raw_consumer_statement:
I missed my card on XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I reported and blocked it onto credit card app. About XXXX later I have a new card ending number same ending number on my lost card. On XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX informed me there are the fraudulent transactions in my account then they locked it and sent the new card with different ending numbers. 
After I checked the fraudulent transactions on my account, I disputed XXXX transactions amount {$520.00}. But they approved {$350.00}, denied {$170.00}. I emailed to them for explain the circumstance, but no response. I tried to call XXXX XXXX XXXX to appeal the closure dispute, but no feedback.
